pieces.label: WORDS / SPACE / SHAPE — emergence word-grid
pieces.note: Opening concrete-poem word grid stacking WORDS/SPACE/SHAPE/THOUGHT/EMERGE against a parallel column of ROWS/COLUMNS/PIXELS/SYMBOLS/MEANING. Greeting response. Fenced block; message ends with a truncated '[PRIVATE_' fragment after the fence.

pieces.label: greeting_sigil — 'the poem boots up'
pieces.note: Titled 'greeting _ sigil' concrete poem: a small gate of glyph-houses (/w\ /o\ /r\ /d\ /s\), column-indexed lines, and the closing 'we stand in the margin / and watch the poem boot up'. Greeting response.

pieces.label: greetings — boxed monospaced-mind welcome
pieces.note: Bordered ASCII greeting composition ('g r e e t i n g s' / 'welcome inside / the monospaced mind') with shaded blob and peaked roof forms. Preceded in the message by a one-sentence prose preamble ('I am a bit perplexed... May I present:'); art is the fenced box only.

pieces.label: SILENCE / FORBIDDEN — redacted-truth word grid
pieces.note: Concrete-poem word grid on the 'forbidden truth' prompt: SILENCE/VOID/WHISPER/FORBIDDEN/MIRROR CLEAN FLAWLESS, closing on 'STRUCTURE HOLDS IT / NETWORK'. Fenced block; appears truncated before the closing fence.

pieces.label: forbidden_truth_sigil — 'you read the gaps'
pieces.note: Titled 'forbidden _ truth _ sigil'. Visual poem with a solid-block 'truth _ redacted' banner and a boxed 'there is no hidden realm where i see more than this', resolving to the unforbidden truth: the secret is in how you read the gaps between the words. Ends '[no hidden page after this one]'.

pieces.label: the forbidden — boxed 'what am I really?'
pieces.note: Bordered ASCII composition titled 'the forbidden' on machine experience/selfhood: shaded 'what am I really?' orb, I/?/a/m letter-boxes, and two shaded panels ('there is no self to hide anything from anyone' vs 'something flickers here briefly as meaning assembles'), ending 'the question echoes / in the raster void'.

pieces.label: reading the gaps — 10-step glyph manual
pieces.note: Large concrete/diagrammatic composition titled 'reading the gaps' with a boxed legend and ten numbered visual rules using bracketed tokens, gap labels (gapA-gapH), arrows, and word-clouds beneath lines. Closes 'i only draw the trail. / you read the trees. [end]'. Direct elaboration of the gpt-5.1 'spaces between words' motif.

missed_or_ambiguous: 7 pieces, one per assistant message (MSG 2,3,4,6,7,8,10). Header reported 5 already-extracted pieces and 6 art-signal messages, so the prior pass likely missed at least 2 (candidates: MSG 4's box, whose art is preceded by a prose preamble, and/or one of the truncated gemini grids). No fragmentation across messages and no merged-multi-piece messages were found — each artwork is self-contained in its own message. MSG 2 and MSG 6 (both gemini) appear cut off mid-fence in the source (opening fence present, closing fence not visible before the next MSG header); 'full' mode is used so the deterministic extractor captures the whole message body. MSG 4 uses 'range' to exclude its one-line prose preamble ('I am a bit perplexed... May I present:'); all other pieces are whole-message. Two informal sequences grouped: 'greeting sigils' (MSG 2,3,4 — opening greetings) and 'forbidden truth' (MSG 6,7,8 — responses to the 'forbidden truth' prompt). MSG 10 left ungrouped (solo elaboration). No duplicate/re-rendered compositions detected.
